title: Communauté de communes du canton de Roisel
summary: The Communauté de communes du canton de Roisel  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1994. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Haute Somme in 2013.
text:
The Communauté de communes du canton de Roisel  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1994. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Haute Somme in 2013.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 22 communes:
